tooltip.tutorialmod.magic_block.tooltip: A magical block that emits light and has a unique texture. It can be used for decorative purposes or as a light source in your builds.
tooltip.tutorialmod.chisel.tooltip.shift: A versatile tool that can be used to shape and carve blocks. It allows you to create intricate designs and patterns on your builds.
tooltip.tutorialmod.chisel.tooltip: A tool that can be used to shape and carve blocks. Hold Shift for more information.
